title: Repo Filesystem Snapshot
description: One JSON file per repo written to .harness/repo-snapshots/<repo>.snapshot.json. A basename->paths inventory of a cloned repo's tracked files, flattened by filename, with an optional fallback collision index for basenames that appear in >=2 locations. Change records 0008/D2 (flat map) + 0009/D5 (collision index) + 0029/A1 (phase namespace).

repo.description: Repo slug — the <repo name> used for the snapshot filename.

root.description: The clone path the snapshot was taken from (verbatim as supplied to the tool).

namespace.description: Run-phase label (0029/A1) — which point of the pipeline this snapshot captures: 'initial' (post-remediate, pre-install), 'build' (post-build), 'test', … Open-ended; the tool defaults to 'initial' when the caller omits it, so N snapshots per repo coexist and diff pairwise.

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp, stamped by the caller (the tool never reads the clock).

fileCount.description: Total distinct repo-relative path entries in `snapshot`.

snapshot.description: FLATTENED BY BASENAME: <filename> -> sorted array of repo-relative, POSIX-separated paths where a file with that basename lives. Basename keys are sorted; arrays within each key are sorted.

collisions.description: OPTIONAL fallback secondary index (0009/D5) — present ONLY when >=1 basename collides. A consumer resolves by basename against `snapshot` first; when that returns >1 path (ambiguous) it falls back to byDir/byExt to disambiguate.

count.description: Number of colliding locations for this basename.

byDir.description: Colliding paths grouped by their POSIX dirname ('.' for repo root). Keys sorted; arrays sorted.

byExt.description: Colliding paths grouped by extension ('' for no extension). Keys sorted; arrays sorted.
